recommendations.title: The Invisible Man
recommendations.overview: When Cecilia's abusive ex takes his own life and leaves her his fortune, she suspects his death was a hoax. As a series of coincidences turn lethal, Cecilia works to prove that she is being hunted by someone nobody can see.

recommendations.title: Insidious: Chapter 3
recommendations.overview: A twisted new tale of terror begins for a teenage girl and her family, and revealing more mysteries of the otherworldly realm, 'The Further'.

recommendations.title: Upgrade

recommendations.title: Saw
recommendations.overview: David, an orderly at a hospital, tells his horrific story of being kidnapped and forced to play a vile game of survival.

recommendations.title: Insidious
recommendations.overview: A family discovers that dark spirits have invaded their home after their son inexplicably falls into an endless sleep. When they reach out to a professional for help, they learn things are a lot more personal than they thought.

recommendations.title: Saw

recommendations.title: The Black Phone

recommendations.title: Night of the Animated Dead
recommendations.overview: An animated retelling of ‘Night of the Living Dead’, in which a group of people in a rural farmhouse struggle to survive the threat of bloodthirsty zombies.
